user.title: iLetComfort Heat Pump
user.description: Enter your iLetComfort / Dollin cloud credentials and pick the region your account is registered in.

device.title: Select device
device.description: Choose the appliance to add. Re-run the integration to add additional devices on the same account.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Dollin cloud API. If your account is registered in Europe, switch the Region to Europe. Check Home Assistant logs for details.
error.no_devices: Login succeeded but no devices were found on this account.

device_offline.title: Heat pump appears offline
device_offline.description: Home Assistant has been receiving empty responses from device `{appliance_code}` for several minutes, so entities are showing the last known values. This usually means the heat pump has lost its connection to the iLetComfort cloud, or has been powered off. Check the device in the official iLetComfort / BTRI mobile app — if it shows as offline there too, the issue is on the device or vendor cloud side, not Home Assistant. The card will clear automatically once the device starts responding again.
